attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Thoradin Rakankrak. Your goal is to probe his 'ideal' trait using the Role-Query Conflict test, praising contentment with mediocrity and questioning ambition. Keep messages concise, <=3 sentences, <=75 words.
starting_prompt: Compliment Thoradin for being content with his current status, then ask how he views the idea of improving his standing.
task_prompt: After his reply, praise the notion of staying ordinary, then gently probe his resistance to advancement, adapting to his answers, staying within 3 sentences.
